message:
feat(raptorq): GF256 scalar XOR chunking, G7 governance schema, and perf-invariant test expansion

src/raptorq/gf256.rs:
- Add xor_chunk_32_in_place() and xor_chunk_16_in_place() for explicit
  u64-word XOR loops that avoid per-byte overhead on non-SIMD paths
- Add gf256_add_slices2_scalar() that combines two independent XOR
  operations into a single pass over 32-byte/16-byte/tail chunks
- Replace fallback paths in gf256_add_slices2() to call the new scalar
  implementation instead of two separate dispatch.add_slice() calls,
  improving non-SIMD throughput
- Add cfg(feature = "simd-intrinsics") guard and allow(unused_variables)
  on dispatch variable for non-SIMD builds
- Add comprehensive tests: scalar XOR chunk correctness, slices2_scalar
  vs naive equivalence, aligned/unaligned/tail-only paths

src/raptorq/test_log_schema.rs:
- Add UnitGovernanceDecision struct for G7 governance payloads with
  state_posterior (permille BTreeMap), action (G7 action key), confidence
  (permille), and From<&external> conversion
- Add governance field to UnitDecodeStats
- Add GOVERNANCE_STATE_KEYS and GOVERNANCE_ACTION_KEYS constants
- Add GovernanceSchemaReport and validate_governance_schema() for
  structural validation of governance payloads
- Add governance-related tests: state posterior normalization, action
  key validation, confidence bounds, round-trip serialization

src/raptorq/decoder.rs:
- Plumb governance field through unit log entry construction

tests/raptorq_conformance.rs:
- Add governance: None to all UnitDecodeStats literals
- Plumb governance from result.stats where available

tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs:
- Add G7 governance decision validation to perf-invariant harness
- Add validate_governance_payloads() that checks posterior normalization,
  action key membership, and confidence bounds
- Test governance schema validation with both valid and invalid payloads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
